zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip le Yonge於1294年5月出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾盧德洛福時，他的父親Geofrey le Yonge30歲，母親Cecilia Ludlow42歲。他於1318年與Cecilia de Ipstones在英國英格蘭素福爾可希頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1340年在英國英格蘭布里斯托享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip le Yonge于1294年5月出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾盧德洛福时，他的父亲Geofrey le Yonge30岁，母亲Cecilia Ludlow42岁。他于1318年与Cecilia de Ipstones在英国英格兰素福爾可希頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1340年在英国英格兰布里斯托享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Yonge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch   De Jonge  , a variant of   De Jong  .

variants.name: De Jonge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Gerrit, Adriaan, Frans, Geert, Hendrik, Jacobus, Joop, Marinus, Marten, Maurits, Nicolaas, Pieter.  German Erna, Hans, Kurt.
Dutch and Flemish: variant of   De Jong  . This surname is also found in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

en.lifeSummary: When Philip le Yonge was born in May 1294, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geofrey le Yonge, was 30 and his mother, Cecilia Ludlow, was 42. He married Cecilia de Ipstones in 1318, in Sibton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1340, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip le Yonge est né en mai 1294, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geofrey le Yonge, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Ludlow, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia de Ipstones en 1318, à Sibton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1340, à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip le Yonge im Mai 1294 in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geofrey le Yonge 30 und seine Mutter Cecilia Ludlow 42. Er hat 1318 in Sibton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Cecilia de Ipstones geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1340 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Bristol, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip le Yonge è nato il nel maggio 1294 nel Ludlow, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geofrey le Yonge, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Ludlow, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia de Ipstones nel 1318, nel Sibton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1340, nel Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip le Yongeが1294年5月にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウで生まれた時，父Geofrey le Yongeは30歳，母Cecilia Ludlowは42歳であった。1318年にイギリスイギリススフォルクシブトンでCecilia de Ipstonesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1340年にイギリスイギリスブリストルで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip le Yonge(이)가 1294년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 루들로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geofrey le Yonge(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Ludlow(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 시브턴에서 Cecilia de Ipstones(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip le Yonge nasceu em maio de 1294, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geofrey le Yonge, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Ludlow, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia de Ipstones em 1318, em Sibton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1340, em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip le Yonge родился май 1294 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geofrey le Yonge было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Ludlow, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia de Ipstones в 1318 г. в местности сибтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1340 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip le Yonge nació en mayo de 1294, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geofrey le Yonge, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Cecilia Ludlow, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Cecilia de Ipstones en 1318, en Sibton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1340, en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
